name: Financial Algebra
description: Use algebra to understand income, banking, credit, investing, taxes, and everyday financial decisions.
descriptionEs: Usa el álgebra para comprender ingresos, banca, crédito, inversiones, impuestos y decisiones financieras cotidianas.

days.title: Course welcome
days.summary: Meet the class, review how the course works, and begin our first financial decision-making discussion.

days.title: What does it cost?
days.summary: Explore how estimation and unit rates influence everyday choices.

days.title: Budget thinking
days.summary: Build a simple needs-and-wants budget model.

days.title: Comparing options
days.summary: Use percent and unit price to compare purchasing decisions.

days.title: Week 1 reflection
days.summary: Review the week and explain one decision using mathematical evidence.
